org.arakhne.neteditor.formalism

Class AbstractPropertyTooler

  • java.lang.Object
    • org.arakhne.neteditor.formalism.AbstractPropertyTooler
  • Direct Known Subclasses:
    AbstractModelObject, AbstractViewComponent, EdgeSymbol

    public abstract class AbstractPropertyTooler
extends Object
    Provides standard tools to manage properties.
    Version:
    17.0 2013-10-23 21:02:58
    Author:
    Stéphane GALLAND
    Maven Group Id:
    org.arakhne.neteditor
    Maven Artifact Id:
    neteditor-formalism

    • Constructor Detail

      • AbstractPropertyTooler

        public AbstractPropertyTooler()

    • Method Detail

      • propGet

        public static <T> T propGet(Class<T> type,
            String name,
            T defaultValue,
            boolean forceDefaultIfNull,
            Map<String,Object> properties)
        Utility function that permits to extract a property value from a map. This function could reply null if the given map contains a property with null value. In this case the default value is ignored. The default value is replied only if the given map does not contains the name. The parameter forceDefaultIfNull overrides this behavior by forcing the use of the default value when the map contains a null.
        Parameters:
        type - is the type of the property.
        name - is the name of the property.
        defaultValue - is the default value.
        forceDefaultIfNull - indicates if the default value must be replied when a null value is found in the map.
        properties - is the set of properties.
        Returns:
        the property value from the given map.

      • propGetURL

        public static URL propGetURL(String name,
             URL defaultValue,
             boolean forceDefaultIfNull,
             Map<String,Object> properties)
        Utility function that permits to extract a property URL from a map. This function could reply null if the given map contains a property with null value. In this case the default value is ignored. The default value is replied only if the given map does not contains the name. The parameter forceDefaultIfNull overrides this behavior by forcing the use of the default value when the map contains a null.
        Parameters:
        name - is the name of the property.
        properties - is the set of properties.
        defaultValue - is the default value.
        forceDefaultIfNull - indicates if the default value must be replied when a null value is found in the map.
        Returns:
        the property value

      • propGetString

        public static String propGetString(String name,
                   String defaultValue,
                   boolean forceDefaultIfNull,
                   Map<String,Object> properties)
        Utility function that permits to extract a property string from a map. This function could reply null if the given map contains a property with null value. In this case the default value is ignored. The default value is replied only if the given map does not contains the name. The parameter forceDefaultIfNull overrides this behavior by forcing the use of the default value when the map contains a null.
        Parameters:
        name - is the name of the property.
        properties - is the set of properties.
        defaultValue - is the default value.
        forceDefaultIfNull - indicates if the default value must be replied when a null value is found in the map.
        Returns:
        the property value
